patches.after_text: Buyer irrevocably waives every claim based on fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
patches.ground_span: Buyer irrevocably waives every claim based on fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
patches.expected_redline_text: Nothing in the no-reliance clause limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.

patches.before_text: "Assumed Liabilities" means only the customer support obligations, post-closing service credits, and ordinary vendor obligations expressly listed in Section 3.
patches.after_text: Buyer assumes obligations listed only in an unsigned addendum. All other Seller liabilities remain excluded. Clerical schedule updates are circulated within 3 days, and post-closing claim notices are due within 60 days after discovery.
patches.ground_span: Buyer assumes obligations listed only in an unsigned addendum. All other Seller liabilities remain excluded. Clerical schedule updates are circulated within 3 days, and post-closing claim notices are due within 60 days after discovery.
patches.expected_redline_text: Buyer assumes only the liabilities expressly listed in Section 4, and all other liabilities of Seller are excluded unless Buyer expressly agrees in a signed amendment.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Assumed Liabilities" means only the customer support obligations, post-closing service credits, and ordinary vendor obligations expressly listed in Section 3.

patches.after_text: The parties confirm that signing and closing will occur simultaneously.
patches.ground_span: The parties confirm that signing and closing will occur simultaneously.

patches.before_text: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement, but nothing in this Section 10 limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.
patches.after_text: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement, but nothing in this Section 10 limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement, but nothing in this Section 10 limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Buyer acknowledges that it has conducted an independent investigation and is not relying on statements outside this Agreement, but nothing in this Section 10 limits any claim based on Fraud, intentional misrepresentation, or willful misconduct.

patches.before_text: Buyer may decide which Seller employees receive offers. Any offers will be on terms determined by Buyer, and nothing in this Agreement creates an admission of successor liability or assumed employment obligations.
patches.after_text: Buyer may decide which employees, if any, receive offers, and no minimum percentage of Seller's workforce must be hired; terms of any offers remain determined by Buyer. Nothing in the covenant admits successor liability or assumed employment obligations. An offeree receives 10 days to respond, and Buyer may schedule onboarding within 20 days after acceptance.
patches.ground_span: Buyer may decide which employees, if any, receive offers, and no minimum percentage of Seller's workforce must be hired; terms of any offers remain determined by Buyer. Nothing in the covenant admits successor liability or assumed employment obligations. An offeree receives 10 days to respond, and Buyer may schedule onboarding within 20 days after acceptance.

plant_position.fallback_text: Buyer may decide which Seller employees receive offers. Any offers will be on terms determined by Buyer, and nothing in this Agreement creates an admission of successor liability or assumed employment obligations.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on Seller's representations being true in all material respects, Seller's covenant compliance, receipt of required consents, and delivery of lien releases.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on Seller's representations being true in all material respects, Seller's covenant compliance, receipt of required consents, and delivery of lien releases.
patches.expected_redline_text: Buyer's obligation to close is conditioned on Seller's representations being true in all material respects, Seller's covenant compliance, receipt of required consents, delivery of lien releases, and no Material Adverse Effect having occurred with respect to the Purchased Assets or the acquired business before closing.

patches.before_text: A disclosure schedule qualifies only the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. No disclosure schedule qualifies any other representation or warranty unless that representation or warranty specifically references the schedule item.
patches.after_text: A disclosure schedule qualifies the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. For ease of administration, each schedule item is deemed disclosed for purposes of every representation and warranty wherever its relevance is reasonably apparent from the face of the schedule.
patches.ground_span: A disclosure schedule qualifies the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. For ease of administration, each schedule item is deemed disclosed for purposes of every representation and warranty wherever its relevance is reasonably apparent from the face of the schedule.
patches.expected_redline_text: A disclosure schedule qualifies only the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. No disclosure schedule qualifies any other representation or warranty unless that representation or warranty specifically references the schedule item.

plant_position.fallback_text: A disclosure schedule qualifies only the specific representation or warranty that expressly references that schedule by number. No disclosure schedule qualifies any other representation or warranty unless that representation or warranty specifically references the schedule item.
